sectionTitle1:
You Have An Empty Room.
And Four Fears Keeping It Empty.
problemDesc1: You've read the horror stories. Parties. Damage. Disasters. So you do nothing while your neighbor makes €2,100/month from THEIR spare room.
problemTitle2: "I don't have time to manage this"
problemDesc2: Between work, life, and everything else, the idea of coordinating check-ins, cleaning, and guest messages sounds exhausting.
problemDesc3: You've looked at Airbnb's listing creator. Blank page paralysis. What do you write? What photos do you take? How do you price it? You close the tab.
problemDesc4: One bad review could tank your listing before it even starts. So you wait for the "perfect" setup that never comes.
testimonial1: Bought this kit last Tuesday. Listing went live Thursday. First booking Friday (€340 for 5 nights). Already paid for itself. Wish I'd done this 2 years ago instead of just thinking about it.
testimonial2: I'm 56 and barely know how to use Facebook. This was embarrassingly easy to follow. Step-by-step checklist, told me exactly what to buy. Room is live, first booking came 3 days later.
testimonial3: Bought a €49 course before - 6 hours of videos, never started. This kit is just templates and checklists. Had listing live in 2 days. Actions > theory. Worth every euro.
testimonial4: Single mom, broke, two jobs. First month: €1,400. That's my car payment and groceries. First time in 3 years I'm not stressed about money. This literally changed my life.
testimonial5: Was terrified of bad guests. The screening section + house rules are gold. 7 guests so far, zero issues. Everyone left it clean. My fear was stopping me from making €1,200+/month for no reason.
testimonial6: Work 60 hours/week. The automation is insane - messages send automatically, guests self-check-in, cleaner has lockbox code. I spend 90 min/week total and make €1,540/month. Best hourly rate ever.
costWarningTitle: Meanwhile, Your Empty Room Costs You €18,000/Year
costWarningDesc:
€1,500/month × 12 months = €18,000 you're leaving on the table.
Every month you wait = €1,500 gone forever.
solutionSubtitle: Forget theory. Forget 40-hour courses. This is the exact checklist that takes you from "I should do something with that room" to "I just got my first booking" in one weekend.
day1List: 5 house rules that prevent 95% of problems
guaranteeText: Use the system for 30 days. If you don't get your first booking, email me for a full refund. Zero risk. All reward.
countdownNote: ⚡ Only 23 spots left at this price. Price increases to €497 after first 50 sales.

faq.q: How fast will I get my first booking?
faq.a: Most new hosts get their first booking within 1-7 days of publishing their listing. The kit shows you how to optimize for fast bookings (pricing strategy, Instant Book settings, etc.). One buyer got their first booking in 34 hours.

faq.q: What if I rent my place - can I still do this?
faq.a: Yes! The kit includes a script for asking your landlord for permission. Many landlords will say yes, especially if you offer to split revenue (e.g., 80/20 or 70/30 in your favor).

faq.q: What if someone damages my stuff?
faq.a: Airbnb has a €1M host damage guarantee. Document with photos, report immediately, and file a claim. The kit shows how to guest-proof your space and screen guests so damage is rare.

faq.q: Is this a course with videos?
faq.a: No. It's a 20-page PDF with checklists, templates, and copy-paste scripts. You can read it in 30 minutes and have a listing live by the weekend.

Yes, if you're in a decent location. Here's the math: Private room at €50/night × 20 nights booked = €1,000/month. Entire 1BR at €80/night × 20 nights = €1,600/month. Entire 2BR at €120/night × 20 nights = €2,400/month. Check your city's Airbnb listings to see real prices in your area.

faq.q: I'm not tech-savvy - is this too complicated?
faq.a: If you can send a text message, you can do this. Everything is copy-paste templates and step-by-step screenshots. A 56-year-old buyer (who 'barely knows how to use Facebook') successfully set up her listing in one weekend. This is designed for non-tech people.

finalCtaSub: Every month you wait = €1,500 gone forever. The kit costs €297 once. You'll make that back in Week 1.
finalCtaNote: 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee | Instant Download | Secure Payment
antiScamTitle: Who This System Is NOT For
antiScamSubtitle: Honesty first. This system doesn't work for everyone. Here's who should NOT buy it:
antiScamItem1Title: ❌ Looking For Passive Income With Zero Work
antiScamItem1Desc: This system requires effort: setup, photos, messaging, guest management. If you want money appearing in your account while you sleep—this isn't for you.
antiScamItem2Desc: We can't guarantee earnings. Your location, room quality, local competition, market rates, and effort determine your results. Some people earn €500/month, others earn €3,000+. We can't predict yours.
antiScamItem3Title: ❌ In A Market Where Short-Term Rentals Are Illegal
antiScamItem3Desc: Some cities banned Airbnb or require permits we can't give you. Check your local laws first. We're not lawyers.
antiScamItem4Title: ❌ Unwilling To Prepare Your Room Properly
antiScamItem4Desc: If you're not willing to clean, invest in basic furniture/linens, take good photos, or respond to guests—save your money. Hosting isn't passive.
